reviews.review_description:
I’ve experienced a few bugs that are game breaking. But other than that the game is really nice!
Is it still being worked on though? I’d love to see more levels in this game!

developer_response.body: thanks for the review, and i dont got time to update it that much because of school and etc,

reviews.review_description: Please update the game we need more content
The game is fun but doesn’t have any players so let’s change that also I’m sorry for mis information

Look another ape game, about 70 this craps a week. Seriously got the runs of poor development. They isn’t one of these games that are good. Yet all the goofs making the same trash give reviews saying they are great. ALL GARBAGE. Don’t care how much work goes into them. Make something better, make something original. Then we get games like Days of Hero’s discontinued, yet this is the trash that needs to be gone. Worst games ever. 
    UPDATED. STILL STRAIGHT TRASH. Can this developer even tell me what’s different about this game, compared to every other ape game that comes out daily? I doubt it. There is absolutely nothing good about this title. Like all the other games just like it, all should be delisted, forcing these goofs to make better. This is simply copy and paste trash.

developer_response.body:
yo i get u didn’t like the game but calling it trash and saying u don’t care about the effort is just messed up. i made this all by myself and spent a lot of time on it. i’d actually be fine if u left a real review saying what i can improve and make better, but just hating for no reason doesn’t help at all. i’d way rather hear feedback than just “this is garbage.” stuff like that is just hating and makes developers feel bad instead of helping them improve.

also i just checked and turns out u haven’t even opened the game yet. so i’d really prefer actual feedback over people dropping 1 stars without even playing it. kinda crazy to rate something u didn’t even try.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
I just read your updated review, and you're saying you wouldn't be able to tell what's different? My game is a co-op horror experience focused on teamwork, where you can buy items to use during your run. Yes, it uses Gorilla Tag-style locomotion because it's the simplest and easiest to implement. But aside from the movement and playermodels, this game is nothing like the so called "slop" fan games you're comparing it to.

– ThatOneCobalt

reviews.review_description: This game is great I really love the unique level design and the only problem is the player count but that will definitely go up this game has a lot of potential keep it up
The game looks awesome, the music slaps and the models are peak, but nobody plays the game, i need pop to play this bruh.

reviews.review_title: An Exquisite and Very Enjoyable Game!!!!
reviews.review_description:
Engaging with this game offers an intellectually stimulating and immersive experience that captures the player’s attention and maintains full engagement throughout. It strikes a perfect balance of complexity and accessibility, appealing to both casual gamers and seasoned enthusiasts alike. The mechanics are thoughtfully crafted, with each decision and action carrying meaningful consequences, reinforcing the player’s sense of agency and immersion.

The environments are beautifully designed, inviting exploration and discovery. Rich details and vibrant landscapes evoke a sense of wonder, while stunning visuals, immersive sound design, and responsive controls create a seamless and intuitive interaction. The game’s fluid interface ensures that the player is never overwhelmed and is consistently immersed in the experience.

The progression system is well-balanced, ensuring a motivating challenge and rewarding milestones that drive the player forward. Each completed objective serves as an advancement within the broader narrative, enhancing the sense of accomplishment and satisfaction.

The game also stands out through its innovative features and deeply integrated narrative elements, which enrich the player’s overall experience. The storyline provides emotional depth, adding layers of immersion and offering moments of intellectual stimulation.

In summary, this game offers a rewarding journey that engages the player’s mind, emotions, and senses. Its combination of masterful design, captivating gameplay, and a compelling narrative ensures an experience that is immersive, intellectually stimulating, and emotionally fulfilling. I highly recommend this game to anyone seeking an enriching, engaging, and unforgettable gaming experience. 10/10
